body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: minion worker + tiered escalation (2026-06-14)
body.description:
**What changed:** Minion worker device executes sprint tickets via cheap inference (DeepSeek V4 Flash) with DONE/ESCALATE tiered escalation baked into the system prompt.

**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) cheap model produces plausible-but-wrong diffs that pass tests but break behavior; (2) ESCALATE signals loop (minion escalates to worker which escalates back); (3) ticket close rate drops vs Claude baseline; (4) budget ledger underestimates cost if DeepSeek charges differ from registry pricing; (5) Granny's cap=1 means one stuck ticket blocks the whole queue

**Signals to watch:** budget ledger openrouter/deepseek spend per closed ticket; escalation tier distribution (what % reach analyst/designer); ticket close rate vs prior 10-ticket baseline; any ESCALATE: worker→worker loops in daemon log

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-14 or after 10 tickets close through the worker.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Completion criteria:** no automated verification — observation ticket; done when predicted effects are annotated as occurred / clear / partial and ticket is closed
